calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury. This matter having been sent to Judge Pro Tem for settlement was able to settle.

Appearances: DAVID FINKELSTEIN, Esq., (650) 348-0102, on behalf of plaintiff Henry Chan.
OSCAR DEL ROSARIO, (415) 424-1204, defendant in pro per

Terms of the settlement as follows: Judgment to be entered in favor of plaintiff Henry Chan and against defendant Oscar Del Rosario in the amount of $7,200.00. Costs and attorney fees waived. Lease forfeited for property located at 814 California St., #21, San Francisco, CA. 94108. Matter stayed until May 11, 2004. All parties agreed to the terms on the record.

Judge Robert Dondero, Clerks: D. Boffi/V.Mu Reporter Jo Ann Bryce (206)
